name: Dwarf
summary: Dwarves are a short, stocky people who are often stubborn, fierce, and devoted.

name: Elf
summary: Elves are a tall, long-lived people with a strong tradition of art and magic.

name: Gnome
summary: Gnomes are short and hardy folk, with an unquenchable curiosity and eccentric habits.

name: Goblin
summary: Goblins are a short, scrappy, energetic people who have spent millennia maligned and feared.

name: Halfling
summary: Halflings are a short, resilient people who exhibit remarkable curiosity and humor.

name: Human
summary: Humans are diverse and adaptable people with wide potential and deep ambitions.

name: Leshy
summary: Leshies are immortal nature spirits placed in small plant bodies, seeking to experience the world.

name: Orc
summary: Orcs are proud, strong people with hardened physiques who value physical might and glory in combat.

name: Azarketi
summary: Azarketis, inheritors of a shattered empire's legacy, hold their proud traditions close but still surface to interact with the rest of the world.

name: Catfolk
summary: Catfolk are highly social, feline humanoids prone to curiosity and wandering.

name: Hobgoblin
summary: Hobgoblins are taller and stronger than their goblin kin, often arranging themselves into military structures.

name: Kholo
summary: Kholos are hyena-headed humanoids who embrace practicality and pragmatism.

name: Kobold
summary: Kobolds are small and reptilian, with features marked by the power they choose to follow.

name: Lizardfolk
summary: Lizardfolk are scaled humanoids with a history that stretches into the distant past.

name: Ratfolk
summary: Ratfolk are small, clever, and adaptable humanoids with ratlike features and a love of community.
